slides.headline: Tackle New Regulations Without Panic
slides.body: Get clear on key points and stay compliant.

slides.body: Understand the scope of the new regulation to determine its impact.
bullets: Review the scope of the new regulation

slides.headline: Decipher the Details
slides.body: Break down complex language to understand its implications.

slides.body: Develop a strategy to implement changes and stay compliant.

slides.headline: Chapter 33 Update
slides.body: Learn how to interpret changes in the Chapter 33 regulations.

slides.body: Know when the new regulations take effect and prepare accordingly.
bullets: Check the 'Effective Date' of the regulation

slides.body: Learn more about navigating new VA regulations. Link in bio.

outline.caption: Master new VA regulations with these three essential questions. Stay compliant and avoid panic.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the last one, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
